---
author:
  - name: Carson Slater
    url: https://carsonslater.github.io
    phone: (480) 320-8898
    email: carsonslater7@gmail.com
    affiliations:
      - name: Baylor University
        department: Department of Statistical Science
date: today
format:
  typst:
    template: template.typ
---

```{=typst}
#section("Contact Information", [
  #grid(
    columns: (1fr, 1fr),
    [
      Department of Statistical Science \
      Baylor University \
      One Bear Place #97140 \
      Waco, Texas 76798, USA
    ],
    [
      #grid(
        columns: (0.6in, 1fr),
        gutter: 0.5em,
        [Phone], [(480) 320-8898],
        [E-mail], [#link("mailto:carsonslater7@gmail.com")],
        [WWW], [#link("https://carsonslater.github.io")]
      )
    ]
  )
])

#section("Research Interests", [
  Time series clustering, anomaly detection, and nonhomogenous hidden markov models with applications in urban water distribution and advanced metering infrastructure technologies.
])

#section("Education", [
  #list-education("education.yaml")
  #entry(
    institution: "Wheaton College (IL)",
    date: "2019-2023",
    description: [
      B.S. Applied Mathematics with Statistics \
      B.A. Economics \
      Edman Presidential Scholarship
    ]
  )
])

#section("Professional Experience", [
  #list-appointments("education.yaml")
])

#section("Articles in Preparation", [
  #citation(
    authors: "Carson Slater, Ryan Shepler, Samantha Bryan, Tzahi Y. Cath, and Amanda S. Hering",
    year: "2026",
    title: "Identifying Outdoor Watering Events with High-Frequency Metering Data to Assess Residential Water Consumption",
    venue: "In Preparation"
  )
])

#section("Peer-Reviewed Publications", [
  #citation(
    authors: "Brittany J. Carnathan, Dinny Stevens, Swarna Shikha, Carson Slater, Nathen Byford, Rodney X. Sturdivant, Kuzy Zarzosa, W. Evan Braswell, and Christie M. Sayes",
    year: "2025",
    title: "Assessing the Effects of Surface-Stabilized Zero-Valent Iron Nanoparticles on Diverse Bacteria Species Using Complementary Statistical Models",
    venue: "Journal of Functional Biomaterials 16 (3)",
    url: "https://doi.org/10.3390/jfb16030113"
  )
])

#section("Conference Proceedings & Other Articles", [
  #citation(
    authors: "Carson Slater, Ryan Shepler, Samantha Bryan, Tzahi Y. Cath, and Amanda S. Hering",
    year: "2026",
    title: "Identifying Outdoor Watering Events with High-Frequency Metering
Data to Assess Residential Water Consumption",
    venue: "2026 ",
    url: "https://doi.org/10.1109/WMCS62019.2024.10619025"
  )
  #citation(
    authors: "Jonathan E. Swindell, Carson Slater, Samuel Hussey, Charles Baylis, and Robert J. Marks",
    year: "2024",
    title: "Assessing Interference with Regression Analysis Techniques",
    venue: "2024 IEEE Texas Symposium on Wireless and Microwave Circuits and Systems (WMCS)",
    url: "https://doi.org/10.1109/WMCS62019.2024.10619025"
  )
  #citation(
    authors: "Amanda S. Hering, Douglas Nychka, Luke Durell, Carson Slater, Michael Poor, Greg Hamerly, and Tzahi Y. Cath",
    year: "2024",
    title: "Mo(Wa)²TER Introduction to Data Science Course Material",
    venue: "Harvard Dataverse",
    url: "https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/BZJW2E"
  )
  #citation(
    authors: "Carson Slater and Ying Li",
    year: "2022",
    title: "Forecasting Fast-Moving Consumer Goods with Generalized Additive Models",
    venue: "2022 University of Illinois Chicago Undergraduate Mathematics Symposium",
    note: "Poster Presentation"
  )
])

#section("Honors & Awards", [
  #list-honors("honors.yaml")
])

#section("Service & Volunteer", [
  #list-positions("positions.yaml")
])

#section("Skills", [
  #grid(
    columns: (1.2in, 1fr),
    gutter: 0.8em,
    [*Technology*], [Docker, Positron ($approx$ VS Code), Git/Github, reveal.js, R/RStudio, SQL, duckDB, #latex.],
    [*Python*], [pandas, numpy, PyTorch (Lightning), plotnine, seaborn, plotly, scikit‑learn, Jupyter],
    [*R*], [tidyverse (dplyr, ggplot2, etc.), TensorFlow (Keras), torch, shiny, RMarkdown/Quarto, rstan, rjags, caret, tidymodels, targets (gittargets, proffer, etc.)],
    [*Statistics*], [statistical modeling, hypothesis testing, mixture models, time series, regression, linear mixed models, clustering, classification, deep learning, PCA, random forests, ensemble models (e.g., XGBoost), SVM, Bayesian methods, spatiotemporal modeling]
  )
])
```
